motivation: non-hydride ambient (0 GPa) counterpoint to a hydride-biased V3 ledger (10/10 hydride). MgB2 reproduces measured Tc=39K = cross-tool-consistency (g5) baseline; Nb3Al A15 tests N5-wall generality beyond hydrides. Calibration, not a 200K hunt.

budget.actual: $0 incremental — reused already-running ysbh6 vast pod (80-core, ~48 free) rather than renting fresh; nice -n 15 -np 8 each, coexists with ysbh6 32 ph.x

infra.host: vast ysbh6 pod 77.104.167.149:41837 (80-core, miniforge3 qe env)
infra.chain: pw.x scf -> ph.x el-ph (electron_phonon=simple), per-dir chain.log marks 'CHAIN DONE'
infra.ssh: raw ssh -i id_vast_anima (hexa cloud ignores vast key per INBOX #1155); vastai CLI not installed locally

mgb2_pure.cell: P6/mmm AlB2 prototype, 3 atoms (1 Mg + 2 B), a=3.086A c=3.524A (Akimitsu 2001)
mgb2_pure.anchor: measured Tc=39K, lambda~0.7, omega_log~700K (canonical el-ph benchmark)
